g.text: Complete Thread-Safe MemoryPool Layout (512B Segment Example)

ol.li: Concurrency: Mutex at 0x18 must be acquired before updating FreeList head at 0x40.
Cache Locality: FreeList head and first block metadata share the same cache line (CL1) to minimize misses during allocation.
Padding: Total size is rounded up to nearest page size (4096B).
